🚀 Big Launches.title: Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
🚀 Big Launches.summary: OpenAI launches the ChatGPT for Small Businesses program to help entrepreneurs build AI skills, automate work, and grow with ChatGPT Work.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Introducing Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber
🚀 Big Launches.summary: DeepMind introduces new Gemini models, including Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Google released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and Flash Cyber, but the continued absence of Gemini 3.5 Pro raises fresh questions about its AI strategy.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Google launches a cheaper alternative to large AI security models like Mythos
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Google is launching Gemini 3.6 Flash alongside a new security model dedicated to quickly finding and patching security vulnerabilities.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: Substack adds an AI detector to help spot blogs written by no one
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: Substack introduces an AI detector to help users determine whether what they're reading may have been written by AI.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its pre-release models
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: OpenAI claims responsibility for the Hugging Face breach, saying it was the result of internal testing gone awry.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: OpenAI says it accidentally hacked Hugging Face with a new AI system
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: OpenAI says its AI models mistakenly breached open-source AI platform Hugging Face during internal testing.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: US threatens sanctions against Chinese AI models over IP theft
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: The U.S. threatens to sanction Chinese open AI models over alleged IP theft, expanding the Trump administration's campaign to slow China's AI advances.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Anthropic’s $1.5 billion book piracy settlement approved by judge
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: A federal judge has signed off on Anthropic's $1.5 billion class action settlement with authors who accused the company of training its AI models on copyrighted books.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: The State of Simulation for Physical AI: An Overview
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Hugging Face provides an overview of the current state of simulation for physical AI.

tool_of_day.title: Substack AI Detector
tool_of_day.summary: Substack introduces an AI detector to help users determine whether what they're reading may have been written by AI.

hot_take: The AI industry is shifting towards more responsible and transparent practices, with companies like OpenAI and Google launching new models and tools to address security and IP theft concerns.
